message:
feat(mission): decision explainability payloads with human-readable rejection reasons (ft-1i2ge.2.6)

Add ExplainabilityReport, DecisionExplanation, ExplanationFactor, and
FactorPolarity types. explain_decisions() generates per-bead explanations
from scorer reports and assignment sets. 18 new tests covering all
rejection variants, factor generation, serde, and mixed outcomes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
